title: Version Unsupported Details
description: Recommended details shape for VERSION_UNSUPPORTED errors. Returned when the buyer's declared `adcp_version` (release) or `adcp_major_version` (integer) is not supported by the seller. Provides the seller's supported versions so the buyer can re-pin and retry without a separate capabilities round-trip.

adcp_version.description: The release-precision version the buyer declared on the failing request (echoed back so callers can correlate). Absent when the buyer declared only `adcp_major_version`.

adcp_major_version.description: The major version the buyer declared (legacy field, echoed back). Absent when the buyer declared only `adcp_version`.

supported_versions.description: Release-precision versions the seller speaks. Authoritative — buyers SHOULD select a value from this list and retry.

supported_majors.description: DEPRECATED in favor of `supported_versions`. Major versions the seller supports. Servers SHOULD emit both through 3.x; removed in 4.0.

build_version.description: Optional advisory: full VERSION.RELEASE.PATCH of the seller's build, for incident triage. Buyers MUST NOT use this field for negotiation.
